reviews.review_description:
Had a fun time with this just a few notes for the devs. 
There needs to be some sort of sound when the next level drops as it comes out of no where and you can't keep watching the timer. 
Would be good to have different level structure. So easy haa more time before a level drops. 
I had fun the physics are really good. The surroundings are excellent. With a few more tweaks would be a fun kids puzzle game. 
Watch my gameplay video. Jentrix | Oculus Quest | Applab | Gameplay | Jenga with fruit
https://youtu.be/YSeVHmWy340

Fantastic Remix on the classic board game Jenga, Jentrix takes everything I love about that and adds some fun extras like throwing at the birds and lining up combos. Add in that its well made both controls and in regards to being graphically pleasing and this is a game I can easily recommend to fans of puzzle games or Jenga.

featured in - https://youtu.be/Naxha7wgbDQ

I have enjoyed playing this title very much along side my family, the game is easily played sat down on the sofa making for a relaxed and comfortable VR experience, with the playful colours and increasing challange adding a appealing factor, the game can be easily picked up and put down in short bursts for those times where time is a factor or those who don't have alot of time generally making it a good purchase all round. I hope they expand on it in future to keep the game fresh and pull me back in for more!

I didn’t expect the game to be so engaging. At first this seemed liked some experimental project for kids, but I quickly got carried away laying out fruits. It’s impossible to quit playing. The world of Jentrix is very beautiful and the gameplay is interesting. My friends and I were laughing out loud when one of us got buried under the fruit pile, but still tried to hold the virtual tower with his hands. An excellent choice for an amusing pastime.

I bought this game not knowing what it would be like. But I had so much fun playing this game, also the Alligator 🐊 made me jump when I got to close to it. I highly recommend this game to anyone who wants to have lots of fun.

reviews.review_title: A game for the whole family 👍🏻
reviews.review_description: It is interesting to play for both children and adults✅

Everybody has noted the Jenga meets match 3, and I appreciate this games blended homage to them. It has its own twist, flavor, and delivery… and it is good. 

There is only one thing that keeps this game out of my regular rotation - when you place a block and let go of the trigger, it can get “jumpy” sometimes. Surgical precision will be met with a result that shakes the entire stack. Sometimes a jolt will send everything to the ground, and you are left restacking at a critical moment.

This will happen even after you have got over the learning curve. If there were an option to soften that jolty occurrence, this would be an incredible experience. I play this game in a well-lit environment, with fresh batteries in the controllers.
